name: lumoshot-mcp
description: Lumoshot MCP Server — annotated screenshot capture for AI agents

scripts.test:all: npm run test:masking && npm run test:integration && npm run test:flow && npm run test:annotator && npm run test:license && npm run test:config
scripts.qa:smoke:keep: npm run -s build && LUMOSHOT_QA_KEEP=1 node scripts/qa-smoke.mjs
scripts.qa:live:strict: npm run -s build && LUMOSHOT_LIVE_STRICT=1 node scripts/qa-live.mjs
scripts.qa:live:amazon: npm run -s build && LUMOSHOT_INCLUDE_AMAZON=1 node scripts/qa-live.mjs
scripts.qa:gate: npm run -s typecheck && npm run -s test:all && npm run -s qa:smoke
scripts.qa:gate:live: npm run -s qa:gate && npm run -s qa:live
